indicators.name: several dining tables
indicators.rationale: Dining tables are not suitable for computer work as they lack the necessary flat surface and ergonomic support for prolonged use.

indicators.name: several chairs
indicators.rationale: Chairs are not designed for extended computer use and do not provide the necessary support for long periods of sitting.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height suitable for placing a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: The chairs do not provide the necessary support for long periods of sitting.

indicators.name: no dedicated lighting for computer work
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting is not sufficient for reducing screen glare and providing adequate task illumination.

indicators.name: no dedicated layout for computer work
indicators.rationale: The layout is open and lacks a dedicated area for computer work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). While there are several dining tables and chairs, they do not provide the necessary flat surface and ergonomic support for prolonged use. There is no dedicated lighting for reducing screen glare and providing adequate task illumination. The layout is open and lacks a dedicated area for computer work, making it unsuitable for focused solo knowledge work.
